title: prunus padus var. genuina
intro: Prunus padus var. genuina, also known as bird cherry or sloe, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Prunus padus var. genuina include its potential to help soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Prunus padus var. genuina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
